name: Submarine
notes: naval sibling to Ghost Tank. canTarget is Naval-only: torpedoes can't threaten Land/Infantry/Structure/Air at all, making it a pure ship-hunter and giving surface ships (Gunboat, Destroyer) an uncontested role against everything else. stealth/revealRange/revealsOnAttack work exactly like Ghost Tank — invisible beyond very short range to non-detectors, full visionRange visibility to detector units/buildings (Sniper, Radar Array), and firing breaks its own cloak until a few seconds pass without attacking. High single-hit damage but slow attack speed reflects a torpedo-strike-then-reposition playstyle.
